# Pace

> On-device Mac voice agent that reads your screen and acts with local context.

## Product

- [Home](https://heypace.app/): Product landing
- [Docs](https://heypace.app/docs/): Blume documentation and searchable project knowledge

## Machine surfaces

- [Agent catalog](https://heypace.app/api/ai): JSON inventory of public surfaces
- [Homepage markdown](https://heypace.app/index.md): Product brief without JS
- [This index](https://heypace.app/llms.txt)

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase
